title: History of NIST Post-Quantum Cryptography Initiative
description: Explore the origins and evolution of NIST's post-quantum cryptography standardization effort, from early quantum computing threats to the landmark 2024 standards.
learningObjectives: Understand why NIST initiated the PQC standardization process
Trace the historical development of quantum computing threats
Identify key milestones in cryptographic standardization history
Explain the relationship between quantum computing advances and cryptographic urgency
Recognize NIST's role in global cryptographic standards
